category_sources: source_facts.description says scaffolding tool to get new projects running quickly; official GitHub repository description matches that purpose.
display_name_sources: source_facts.name and current_curation.display-name are kickstart; official GitHub repository is Keats/kickstart.
docs_sources: source_facts.repo is already populated; no dedicated official docs site found, so the official GitHub README is the best documentation surface.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo already has https://github.com/Keats/kickstart; per instruction, repo is returned as null and not re-evaluated.
tags_sources: source_facts.description identifies project scaffolding; official GitHub README examples show using kickstart with template repositories.
